title: Space Station Craft 14
description: This project aims to recreate the game Space Station 14 in Minecraft.
body:
![ssc14 logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20ae4a06aa7e2b1a752fc017a35d22cffc03a74b.png)

# 🌌 About the mod 🌌
  This mod is an attempt to port the game Space Station 14 into Minecraft. The purpose of SSC14 is to fully _(or almost fully)_ transfer the game's mechanics into a three-dimensional space using the Minecraft engine. 

## ⚙️ How this mod works in-game ⚙️
  *It is not designed as a modification for modpacks or simple survival gameplay.* I do not recommend using it that way, as it will 100% behave strangely with vanilla Minecraft objects and cause inconvenience. The mod creates its own isolated environment, with its own mechanics, dimensions, and so on. 
  **The only reasons you might need it are:** 
1. Personal exploration of this modification, building stations, and other activities. 
2. Connecting to SSC14 servers (in the distant future);

![ssc14 incompatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3956472e6fcf31b1316cd0abbb2d92a1bc508542.png)

## ☄️ What it adds ☄️
It's simple! It ports content from the game Space Station 14 into Minecraft. Specifically: 
- Space, just as empty as in real life or SS14; 
- Building blocks: walls, hull plating, tiles, frames, grates, windows, airlocks, wires, etc.; 
- Mechanics: dragging unanchored objects, performing actions with delays and progress bars, step-by-step disassembly and assembly of equipment using tools, gravity, etc.; 

![ssc14 content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa0316ea5e790dbede802946679443d1028c488d.png)

## Technical information

**The mod is being created using MCreator.** 

### Required mods for SSC14 to work: 

[ItemPhysic](https://modrinth.com/mod/itemphysic) 

[CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) 

[CuriosAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) 

### Connect with mod development: 

You can join the project on [Discord](https://discord.gg/Mwu8hKvntm)

![ssc14 discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a10e9ad371e48b96b8198751f9d4d15956da861b.png)
